if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", T1.SHIP_NAME as "label", T1.TOTAL_WEIGHT as "totalWeight", T1.SHIP_WIDTH as "shipWidth", T1.NET_WEIGHT as "netWeight", T1.DWT as "dwt", T1.FULL_LOAD_WATER as "fullLoadWater", T1.EMPTY_LOAD_WATER as "emptyLoadWater", T1.SHIP_LENGTH as "shipLength", T1.CAPTAIN_PHONE as "captainPhone", T1.IMO as "imo", T1.CALL_NO as "callNo" FROM M_SHIP T1 where T1.ID
#{item}

SELECT distinct T1.ID AS "value", T1.SHIP_NAME as "label" FROM M_SHIP T1 INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T2 ON T1.ID = T2.SHIP_ID WHERE 1=1
and (T1.SHIP_NAME like #{labelContent} OR T1.SHIP_NAME_EN LIKE #{labelContent} )

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "shipvoyageId", T2.ID AS "value", CONCAT(CONCAT(T1.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T2.VOYAGE) as "label", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", T2.CUSTOMER_NAME as "shipAgentName", T1.START_PORT_NAME as "startPortName", T1.END_PORT_NAME as "endPortName", TO_CHAR(T1.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "arrivalTimePlan", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T2.VOYAGE as "voyage", T2.LOAD_UNLOAD as "loadUnload", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE as "cargoCategoryCode", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", CARGO_NUM as "cargoNum" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T2 ON T1.ID = T2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID where T2.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", CONCAT(CONCAT(T1.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T1.SCN) as "label", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T1.SHIP_ID as "shipId" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 WHERE T1.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", CONCAT(CONCAT(T1.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T1.SCN) as "label", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T1.SHIP_ID as "shipId" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 WHERE T1.ID
#{item}

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", T1.CUSTOMER_NAME as "label" FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER T1 WHERE T1.STATUS = '10'
AND T1.ID IN (SELECT T2.CUSTOMER_ID FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER_PROPERTY T2 WHERE T2.CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_CODE = #{property} )
and (T1.CUSTOMER_NAME like #{labelContent} OR T1.CUSTOMER_SHORT_NAME LIKE #{labelContent} OR T1.SHORTHAND_CODE LIKE #{labelContent})
and rownum <= #{search.number}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", T1.CUSTOMER_NAME as "label" FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER T1 where T1.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.BHT_ID AS "value", T1.CUSTOMER_NAME as "label" FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER T1 where T1.BHT_ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1. ID AS "value", CONCAT ( CONCAT ( CONCAT ( CONCAT ( CONCAT ( CONCAT ( T1.SHIP_NAME || '_' || T2.VOYAGE || '/' || T1.COMPANY_NAME, '/' ), CONCAT (T1.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, '/') ), CONCAT (T1.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, '/') ), CONCAT (T1.CARGO_NAME, '/') ), CONCAT (T1.TRADE_TYPE, '/') ), T1.PACKING_NAME ) AS "label", T1.CARGO_INFO_NO as "cargoInfoNo", T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID as "shipvoyageId", T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID as "shipvoyageItemId", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T1.COMPANY_ID as "companyId", T1.COMPANY_NAME as "companyName", T1.CARGO_OWNER_ID as "cargoOwnerId", T1.CARGO_OWNER_NAME as "cargoOwnerName", T1.CARGO_AGENT_ID as "cargoAgentId", T1.CARGO_AGENT_NAME as "cargoAgentName", T1.CARGO_CODE as "cargoCode", T1.CARGO_NAME as "cargoName", T1.TRADE_TYPE as "tradeType", T1.PACKING_CODE as "packingCode", T1.PACKING_NAME as "packingName", T1.QUANTITY as "quantity", T1.TON as "ton" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO T1 left join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T2 ON T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = T2.ID where T1.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", T1.PORT_NAME as "label" FROM M_PORT T1 where T1.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM), '/'), M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "label", CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM), '/'), M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "massNameFull", M1.ID as "value", M1.ID as "massId", M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "massName", M3.ID as "storehouseId", M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "storehouseName", M2.ID as "regionId", M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "regionName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD M1, M_STORAGE_YARD M2, M_STORAGE_YARD M3 WHERE M1.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND M1.PARENT_ID = M2.ID AND M2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND M2.PARENT_ID = M3.ID AND M3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' AND M1.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "label", CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "massNameFull", M2.ID as "value", M3.ID as "storehouseId", M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "storehouseName", M2.ID as "regionId", M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "regionName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD M2, M_STORAGE_YARD M3 WHERE M2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND M2.PARENT_ID = M3.ID AND M3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' AND M2.ID
#{item}

mapper.select:
SELECT
PROVINCE_CODE as "value",
CITY_CODE as "value",
NAME as "label" FROM M_CITY WHERE
PROVINCE_CODE = #{provinceCode} AND CITY_CODE IS NOT NULL
CITY_CODE IS NULL

SELECT PROCESS_CD as "value", PROCESS_NM as "label", SOURCE_CD as "sourceCode", TARGET_CD as "targetCode", PLAN_TYPE_CD as "planTypeCd", PROCESS_TYPE_CD as "processTypeCd" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PARENT_ID = '-1'
AND PLAN_TYPE_CD = #{planTypeCode}

select MAC_TYPE_CODE as "value", MAC_TYPE_NAME as "label", ID as "id" from m_machine_type
and (MAC_TYPE_CODE like #{macName} or MAC_TYPE_NAME like #{macName} )
order by MAC_TYPE_CODE

select S1.ID as "value", S1.USER_NAME as "label" from SYS_USER S1 JOIN SYS_ROLE_USER S2 ON S1.ID = S2.USER_ID JOIN SYS_ROLE S3 ON S2.ROLE_ID = S3.ID where ROLE_CODE = #{role} OR ROLE_NAME = #{role} order by S1.SORT_NUM
select S1.ID as "value", S1.USER_NAME as "label" from SYS_USER S1 where POST_CODE = #{post} order by S1.SORT_NUM
select S1.ID as "value", S1.USER_NAME as "label" from SYS_USER S1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT S2 ON S1.DEPT_ID = S2.ID where DEPT_LEVEL = '4' AND S2.DEPT_NAME = #{workClass} order by S1.SORT_NUM

select S1.ID as "value", S1.DEPT_NAME as "label" from SYS_DEPT S1 where S1.DEPT_LEVEL = #{deptLevel} AND S1.DEPT_NO LIKE CONCAT((SELECT DEPT_NO FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId}), '%') order by S1.ORDER_NO

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.CARGO_CODE AS "value", T1.CARGO_NAME as "label", T1.WORK_TYPE as "workType" FROM M_CARGO T1 WHERE T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.STATUS = '1' and T1.CARGO_CODE
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.BHT_ID AS "value", T1.CARGO_NAME as "label", T1.WORK_TYPE as "workType" FROM M_CARGO T1 WHERE T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.STATUS = '1' and T1.BHT_ID
#{item}

mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CONTACT_NO FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT
AND CUSTOMER_ID IN
#{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND 1 != 1
ORDER BY CONTACT_NO

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.CARGO_CODE AS "value", CASE WHEN T1.SIGN IS NOT NULL THEN T1.CARGO_NAME || '(' || T1.SIGN || ')' ELSE T1.CARGO_NAME END AS "label", T1.WORK_TYPE as "workType", DECODE(T1.STATUS, '1', 0, 1) "disabled" FROM M_CARGO T1 WHERE T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.STATUS = '1' and T1.CARGO_CODE
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.CARGO_CODE AS "value", CASE WHEN T1.SIGN IS NOT NULL THEN T1.CARGO_NAME || '(' || T1.SIGN || ')' ELSE T1.CARGO_NAME END AS "label", T1.WORK_TYPE as "workType" FROM M_CARGO T1 WHERE T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.STATUS = '1' and T1.CARGO_CODE
#{item}

mapper.select:
SELECT ID as "value", MAC_NAME as "label" FROM M_MACHINE WHERE 1 = 1
AND MAC_TYPE_CODE = #{macTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (MAC_TYPE_CODE = #{parent,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR MAC_MODEL_CODE = #{parent,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND DEPT_ID in ( SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_NO = #{ownerDeptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
ORDER BY "label" ASC

SELECT u.ID as "value", u.USER_NAME as "label" FROM SYS_USER u JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.ID AND d.ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_LEVEL,DEPT_NAME FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = #{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR ID = PARENT_ID ) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL IN (3,4) ) where u.STATUS = '1'

select DELIVERY_NUMBERS label,id value from T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE where 1=1
and DELIVERY_NUMBERS like #{labelContent}
SELECT DICT_VALUE as "value", DICT_LABEL as "label" FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE DICT_TYPE = 'WORK_TYPE' AND DICT_ENG_LABEL = '1' ORDER BY "label" ASC
SELECT DICT_VALUE as "value", DICT_LABEL as "label" FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE DICT_TYPE = 'WORK_TYPE' AND DICT_ENG_LABEL IS NULL ORDER BY "label" ASC

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "value", T1.CARGO_INFO_NO as "label" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO T1 WHERE T1.ID
#{item}

if.test: null != search.valueContentList and search.valueContentList.size() > 0 and '' != search.labelContent and null != search.labelContent

select.if: UNION

SELECT T1.ID AS "shipvoyageId", T2.ID AS "value", CONCAT(CONCAT(T1.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T2.VOYAGE) as "label", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", T2.CUSTOMER_NAME as "shipAgentName", T1.START_PORT_NAME as "startPortName", T1.END_PORT_NAME as "endPortName", TO_CHAR(T1.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "arrivalTimePlan", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T2.VOYAGE as "voyage", T2.LOAD_UNLOAD as "loadUnload", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE as "cargoCategoryCode", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", CARGO_NUM as "cargoNum" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T2 ON T1.ID = T2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID where T2.ID
#{item}

mapper.select: SELECT distinct e.DICT_LABEL "label" , M1.STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE "value" FROM M_STOP_REASON M1 LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA e ON M1.STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE = e.DICT_VALUE AND e.DICT_TYPE = 'STOP_REASON_TYPE' WHERE m1.STOP_REASON_CLASS_CODE = #{parent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
